description.p: STube is a simple dark-mode downloader for YouTube and about 1800 other sites, powered by yt-dlp. Paste a link, preview the video, pick a quality (up to 4K) or extract audio to MP3/M4A/Opus, and watch the queue with live progress. Supports playlists and embedding subtitles, thumbnails and metadata.
To get past YouTube's bot checks, STube can borrow the YouTube cookies from a browser on your computer (Brave, Chrome, Chromium, Edge or Firefox). Cookies never leave your machine.

screenshot.caption: Main window with the download queue

description.p: Fix browser cookie import when running as a Flatpak.
The Buy Coffee dialog now shows the app version.
The download queue now shows the video title instead of the link while downloading.
New application ID and repository name for Flathub. No functional changes.
